\tzpentry{ID4381}{Curvature Parametrization}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4381 introduces Curvature Parametrization as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} h_{+}(s) &= \begin{pmatrix} R \cos(2\pi s / \lambda) \\ R \sin(2\pi s / \lambda) \\ \frac{p}{2\pi} (2\pi s / \lambda) \end{pmatrix}, \\ h_{-}(s) &= \begin{pmatrix} R \cos(2\pi s / \lambda + \pi) \\ R \sin(2\pi s / \lambda + \pi) \\ \frac{p}{2\pi} (2\pi s / \lambda) \end{pmatrix}, \end{align}
